tonePrompts.formal: Araba ka mokhoa o hlakileng le o hlomphehang.
tonePrompts.short: Araba ka polelo e le 'ngoe e khutšoanyane
tonePrompts.deep: Fana ka karabo e tebileng ea tlhahlobo e nang le mabaka.
tonePrompts.scientific: Araba joalo ka rasaense, ka lihokelo tsa lipatlisiso kapa data.
tonePrompts.empathic: Arabela ka kutloelo-bohloko, u ele hloko maikutlo a motho e mong.

translation.enableSub: Bot e tla khutlela ka phapusing

billing.lowBalanceSub: Reka metsotso e eketsehileng ho ntšetsa moqoqo oa hau pele.

changePwd.title: Fetola senotlolo

changePwd.errSameAsOld: Phasewete e ncha e tsamaellana le ea khale
changePwd.errWrongCurrent: Phasewete ea hona joale ha e nepahale
changePwd.errNoPassword: Phetoho ea phasewete ha e fumanehe bakeng sa akhaonto ena (ho kena ka Google).
changePwd.errSuperAdmin: Phasewete ea super-admin e behiloe ho tlhophiso ea seva.
changePwd.errGeneric: Ha e khone ho fetola phasewete

sip.title: Mohala oa SIP
sip.subtitle: Ho hlophisa li-trunk bakeng sa mehala e kenang le e tsoang
sip.loginLabel: Lebitso la mosebedisi (ho kena ka SIP)
sip.encryption: Ho ngolla ka mokhoa o patehileng
sip.passwordChangeLabel: Senotlolo se secha (tlohela se se na letho hore se se fetohe)

incoming.heading: Mehala e kenang ea SIP
incoming.lead: Aterese ea SIP e ikhethang bakeng sa ho fetisetsa mehala ea kantle ho tsoa ho mofani oa hau ho ea tsamaisong ea VibeVox.
incoming.emptyTitle: Aterese ea SIP e kenang ha ea etsoa
incoming.emptyHint: Theha SIP URI e ikhethang + login/senotlolo e le hore bareki ba ka u letsetsa ho tsoa fonong efe kapa efe, 'me VibeVox e tla fetolela lentsoe la hau ka bo eona ka nako ea sebele.
incoming.create: Theha aterese ea SIP bakeng sa mehala e kenang
incoming.active: Mehala e kenang e ntse e amoheloa.
incoming.paused: Aterese ea SIP e thehiloe, kamohelo e emisitsoe
incoming.activeHint: Mofetoleli oa Bridge o mametse kamore. Pitso e 'ngoe le e 'ngoe e fetoleloa ka nako ea sebele.
incoming.pausedHint: Kenya tshebetsong kamohelo ho etsa hore VibeVox e qale ho fetolela mehala e kenang.
incoming.createdToast: Aterese ea SIP e kenang e thehiloe
incoming.deletedToast: Aterese ea SIP e kenang e tlositsoe
incoming.createFailed: E hlōlehile ho theha aterese ea SIP

outbound.heading: Mohala o tswang
outbound.lead: Letsetsa nomoro ea mohala ho tsoa ho sebopeho sa webo 'me VibeVox e tla fetolela moqoqo oa hau ka bohona ka nako ea sebele.
outbound.noTrunkTitle: Taba ea pele, hlophisa trunk ea SIP e tsoang
outbound.noTrunkHint: Tlatsa foromo ea "New SIP Trunk" holimo ho leqephe - VibeVox e tla sebelisa mofani oa hau oa SIP (Zadarma, OnlinePBX, jj.) bakeng sa mehala e tsoang.
outbound.configureFirst: Taba ea pele, hlophisa trunk ea SIP e tsoang (foromo e kaholimo)
outbound.invalidNumber: Ka kopo kenya nomoro e nepahetseng ka mokhoa oa machaba (+XXXXXXXXXXXX)

howTo.heading: Mokhoa oa ho hlophisa
howTo.step1: Fumana mangolo a tumello a SIP ho mofani oa hau oa litšebeletso (Zadarma, OnlinePBX, Asterisk).
howTo.step2: Li kenye ka foromo e ka holimo 'me u li boloke.
howTo.step3: VibeVox e tla iketsetsa kutu ea SIP e tsoang ka bo eona ho LiveKit Cloud.
howTo.step4: E tla tla haufinyane: SIP URI e kenang bakeng sa ho fetisetsa mehala kantle.

toasts.saved: Litlhophiso tsa kutu ea SIP li bolokiloe
toasts.loadFailed: E hlolehile ho kenya litlhophiso tsa SIP: {{error}}

validation.loginRequired: Ka kopo kenya lebitso la hau la mosebelisi

tenantOnly.title: Li-SIP trunk li hlophisitsoe boemong ba mohiri
tenantOnly.hint1: Mohala oa SIP o ke ke oa hlophisoa tlas'a ak'haonte ea superadmin (ntle le UUID ea mohiri).
tenantOnly.hint2: Kena joalo ka mosebelisi ea tloaelehileng ea nang le tenantId ea hae ho theha trunk.

sip.connected: Kutu ea SIP e bolokiloe le ho hokahanngoa le LiveKit

sections.providerData: Lintlha bakeng sa mofani oa hau oa SIP

danger.deleteTrunkHint: Sebopeho se tla hlakoloa. Mehala e tsoang e tla emisa ho fihlela o bopa trunk bocha.
danger.deleteInbound: Tlosa aterese ea SIP bakeng sa mehala e kenang
danger.deleteInboundHint: Molao oa ho kenya thepa ka har'a LiveKit le oa ho romela thepa li tla tlosoa. Mehala e kenang e ke ke ea hlola e amoheloa.
danger.reissueHint: Lokolla hape login le senotlolo bakeng sa aterese ya SIP. Tlhahisoleseding ya kgale e ke ke ya hlola e sebetsa.

outbound2.rateInfo: Litšenyehelo ka motsotso tsa mohala o tsoang li khethoa ke mofani oa hau oa SIP.

confirm.deleteTrunkBody: Ketso ena e ke ke ea fetoloa. Hang ha e hlakotsoe, mehala e tsoang e tla emisa ho fihlela trunk e ncha e etsoa.
confirm.deleteInboundTitle: Tlosa aterese ea SIP bakeng sa tse kenang?
confirm.deleteInboundBody: Ketso ena e ke ke ea fetoloa. Molao oa kutu e kenang le oa ho romela ho LiveKit Cloud o tla hlakoloa.

page.title: Litlhophiso tsa Enterprise
page.subtitle: Likopanyo tsohle, linotlolo le liparamente tsa AI bakeng sa akhaonto ea hau
page.upsellTitle: Karolo ena e fumaneha morerong oa Enterprise.
page.upsellBody: Mona o ka hlophisa: senotlolo sa Gemini API sa botho, pontsho le motheo wa tsebo, kopanyo le bot ya Quest Flow + Telegram, le ho hokela ho Chatwoot CRM.

common.savedPlaceholder: E bolokiloe (kenya e ncha ho e nkela sebaka)

apiKey.savedPlaceholder: E bolokiloe (kenya e ncha ho e nkela sebaka)

gemini.heading: Senotlolo sa Google Gemini API
gemini.lead: Senotlolo sa botho ho tsoa ho AI Studio. Sena se nkela senotlolo sa lefats'e bakeng sa mehala eohle ea Gemini akhaonteng ea hau sebaka.
gemini.leadPrefix: Senotlolo sa botho ho tsoa ho
gemini.leadSuffix: . E sebelisitsoe ho fapana le ea lefats'e bakeng sa mehala eohle ea Gemini akhaonteng ea hau.
gemini.errEnterKey: Kenya senotlolo sa hau sa Gemini API
gemini.successSavedValidated: Senotlolo se bolokiloe le ho netefatsoa - sea sebetsa.
gemini.successValid: Senotlolo sea sebetsa - Gemini API ea fumaneha.
gemini.confirmDeleteTitle: Tlosa senotlolo sa Gemini sa mohiri?
gemini.confirmDeleteBody: Mesebetsi ea AI e tla sebelisa senotlolo se arolelanoang sa VibeVox (haeba se hlophisitsoe).

telegram.heading: Bot ea telegram bakeng sa litsebiso
telegram.lead: Theha bot ka @BotFather 'me u kenye token ea eona. Mang kapa mang ea romellang bot ena molaetsa ka /start o tla fumana litsebiso: bareki ba bacha, li-tag, liphoso tsa kopanyo. U ka ingolisa basebetsi ba bangata kapa ua eketsa bot sehlopheng kapa mocha - litsebiso li tla romelloa ho bohle ka bohona.
telegram.leadAfterStart: , e tla fumana ditsebiso mabapi le bareki ba batjha, di-tag le diphoso tsa kopanyo. O ka ingodisa basebetsi ba bangata kapa wa eketsa bot sehlopheng kapa kanaleng—bohle ba tla fumana ditsebiso ka boiketsetso.
telegram.successSavedWithBroadcast: ✓ Bot @{{username}} e bolokiloe. Litumeliso li rometsoe ho ba ngolisitseng {{sent}}.
telegram.successSavedNoBroadcast: ✓ Bot @{{username}} e bolokiloe. Mang kapa mang ea e romellang molaetsa /ea qalang o tla fumana litsebiso.
telegram.successTestMany: ✓ Molaetsa o rometsoe ho baamoheli ba {{count}}. Ka kopo, sheba Telegram.
telegram.testTooltip: Romella tsebiso ea teko ka bot
telegram.confirmUnlinkBody: Bangolisi le bona ba tla tlosoa - litsebiso li tla khaotsa ho tla.
telegram.lastBroadcast: Phatlalatso ea morao-rao: e rometsoe {{sent}} ho tsoa ho {{total}}

imageModel.heading: Image generation model
imageModel.lead: Single model for the whole account, used ONLY for image generation/editing in Quest Flow. Translation and recognition keep their own model.
imageModel.needKey: Boloka 'me u netefatse senotlolo sa API pele — tlhahiso ea setšoantšo ea hlokahala.
imageModel.hint: Nano Banana e hlahisa, e hlophisa le ho hlophisa. Imagen e hlahisa feela ho tloha qalong.

prompt.heading: Malebela
prompt.subtitle: Tlhahiso le motheo oa tsebo bakeng sa ho ngola likamoreng tsa video feela
prompt.warning: Ha ea lokela ho ferekanngoa le Quest Flow
prompt.kbLabel: Motheo oa tsebo (moelelo oa k'hamphani, Lipotso Tse Botsoang Khafetsa, lintlha)
prompt.showDefault: AI e sebelisa eng ka bo eona?
prompt.appendNote: O ka eketsa melao ea hau - e tla kopanngoa le e kamehla.
prompt.headerLeadBold1: bakeng sa ho ngola melaetsa ka likamoreng tsa video feela
prompt.headerLeadPart2: - ha o tobetsa molaetsa moqoqong mme o kgetha modumo
prompt.contextLeadPart1: E sebelisoa ha o tobetsa molaetsa moqoqong oa kamore ea video le ho khetha molumo
prompt.contextLeadPart2: Motheo oa tsebo le oona o kopantsoe le (ka tlase).
prompt.defaultSummary: Seo AI e se sebelisang ka boiketsetso (haeba tšimo ea hau e se na letho) - tobetsa ho bona
prompt.extendNoteText: ka melao/setaele/mareo a bona - a tla kopanngoa le tlhahiso ea kamehla e kaholimo le motheo oa tsebo.
prompt.kbHeading: Setsi sa Tsebo — TXT / Word / Excel / CSV
prompt.kbLead: Kenya tokomane—khataloganyo, Lipotso Tse Botsoang Khafetsa, lethathamo la litheko, melaoana, kapa lisebelisoa tsa likeletso. Litaba li hlahlobiloe ho seva (Word/Excel/CSV → mongolo) 'me li kopantsoe ke AI ha ho ngoloa melaetsa likamoreng tsa video. Moeli: Faele ea 50 MB / litlhaku tse 500,000 polokelongtshedimosetsong.
prompt.successFileUploaded: Faele "{{filename}}" ({{format}}) e kentswe - litlhaku tsa {{kbLength}} li bolokiloe.
prompt.successFileTruncated: Dikahare di kgutsufaditswe ho ba ditlhaku tse {{max}}.
prompt.successKbCleared: Motheo oa tsebo o se o hlakotsoe.
prompt.confirmKbDeleteBody: Litokomane tsohle tse kentsoeng li tla nyamela. Ketso ena e ke ke ea fetoloa.
prompt.presetsHeading: Melumo e fumanehang habonolo ea tlhaloso
prompt.presetsLeadPart1: Moqoqong oa Kamore ea Enterprise, o ka totobatsa molaetsa ofe kapa ofe 'me oa kopa AI ho o hlalosa ka molumo o khethiloeng.
prompt.presetsLeadPart2: e sebelisa tlhahiso ea hau ho tsoa tšimong e kaholimo.

questFlow.heading: Quest Flow
questFlow.subtitle: Likarabo tsa AI ho bareki ka liroboto tsa Telegram le Inbound API
questFlow.warning: Haeba tšimo e se na letho, ho sebelisoa tlhahiso e akaretsang ea VibeVox.
questFlow.promptLabel: Prompt ea Sistimi ea Quest Flow
questFlow.kbLabel: Setsi sa Tsebo sa Quest Flow
questFlow.headerLead: Puisano ea AI le moreki e mong le e mong ka bomong ka bot ea Telegram e hokahantsoeng le Quest Flow.
questFlow.keysHeading: Linotlolo tsa API tsa Quest Flow
questFlow.keysLead: Senotlolo se seng le se seng ke sephiri seo o se kenyang bolokong ba Quest Flow HTTP ba ketane. VibeVox e se sebedisa ho hlwaya ak'haonte ya hao. O ka theha dinotlolo tse ngata bakeng sa diketane tse fapaneng.
questFlow.keyLabelPlaceholder: Leibole (ha ho hlokahale), mohlala: "Kliniki ea bot ea lihlahisoa"
questFlow.createdWarning: ⚠ Boloka senotlolo - se bontšoa hanngoe feela
questFlow.noKeysHint: Ha ho na dinotlolo hajwale. Theha ya pele.
questFlow.confirmRevokeBody: Quest Flow e tla emisa ho sebetsa ho eona.
questFlow.promptLead1: E fumana hore na AI e buisana joang le bareki ka Quest Flow: molumo, setaele, le seo e lokelang ho se tsebahatsa.
questFlow.promptLeadBold1: Haeba tšimo e se na letho
questFlow.promptLead2: — ho sebediswa tlhahiso e akaretsang ya VibeVox (ka tlase).
questFlow.promptLead3: - e tla kopanngoa le prompt ea motheo le motheo oa tsebo.
questFlow.defaultSummary: Seo AI e se sebelisang ka boiketsetso (haeba tšimo ea hau e se na letho) - tobetsa ho bona
questFlow.successPromptSaved: Prompt ea Quest Flow e bolokiloe.
questFlow.kbHeading: Motheo oa Tsebo bakeng sa Quest Flow
questFlow.kbLead1: Litokomane – lethathamo la litšebeletso, lethathamo la litheko, Lipotso Tse Botsoang Khafetsa. Kenya TXT / Word / Excel / CSV.
questFlow.kbLead2: — AI e ke ke ea ba le lintlha tsa k'hamphani; e tla araba feela ho latela tsebo e akaretsang. Motheo ona
questFlow.kbLead3: Ho tsoa karolong ea "Litlhahiso"—bakeng sa ho ngola video. Moeli: Faele ea 50 MB / litlhaku tse 500,000 polokelongtshedimosetsong.
questFlow.successKbCleared: Motheo oa tsebo o se o hlakotsoe.
questFlow.confirmKbDeleteBody: Motheo oa tsebo ea Quest Flow o tla hlakoloa. Ketso ena e ke ke ea fetoloa.
questFlow.tagsLead: AI e abela bareki li-tag tsena haeba e lemoha ho tšoana moqoqong. Li-tag li bontšoa kareteng ea kamore ea moreki 'me li fetisetsoa ho CRM (Karolo ea 4).
questFlow.confirmDeleteBody: Senotlolo se tla hlakoloa ruri. Quest Flow e ke ke ea hlola e sebetsa ka sona — o tla hloka ho theha senotlolo se secha le ho se nkela sebaka phallong.

chatwoot.heading: Kopanyo ea CRM (Chatwoot)
chatwoot.subtitle: Romela nalane ea mehala le li-tag ka bohona ho Chatwoot.
chatwoot.headerLead: E fetisetsa nalane ea moqoqo le li-tag tsa litlhoko tsa bareki ho Chatwoot CRM
chatwoot.urlFieldLabel: URL ea Chatwoot (e its'oarellang kapa app.chatwoot.com)
chatwoot.tokenFieldLabel: Token ea Phihlello ea Moemeli (ho tsoa ho Profaele → Token ea Phihlello)
chatwoot.testSuccess: Khokahano e ntse e sebetsa - Chatwoot e ntse e arabela.
chatwoot.successSaved: E bolokiloe. Joale tobetsa "Leka Khokahano" ho hlahloba.
chatwoot.whatSentHeading: Ke eng e fetisoang ho Chatwoot
chatwoot.whatSentItem1: Ho ikopanya le moreki (ka telegram_user_id, ka custom_attributes)
chatwoot.whatSentItem2: Moqoqo o nang le molaetsa oa poraefete = nalane e felletseng ea puisano
chatwoot.whatSentItem3Prefix: Li-tag tsohle tse abetsoeng tsa litlhoko ho
chatwoot.whatSentFooter: E rometswe ha o tobetsa ka letsoho "Romela ho CRM" moqoqong wa phaposi. Ho romela ka boiketsetso ha ho fumanwa tag ke karolo e latelang.

imagePresets.heading: Image processing blocks
imagePresets.lead: Each block is a preset: a function + prompt + (optional) reference images. The bot button in Quest Flow sends this preset's key, and VibeVox transforms the image with exactly this preset — the AI chooses nothing.
imagePresets.modelHint: change it in the Gemini API section
imagePresets.empty: No blocks yet. Add the first one.
imagePresets.confirmDeleteBody: The block will be removed after you save.
imagePresets.labelPlaceholder: Block name, e.g. “Try on our jacket”
imagePresets.presetKeyLabel: Preset key (paste into the Quest Flow button)
imagePresets.promptExtraLabel: Extra prompt (added to the function's base prompt)
imagePresets.intakeLabel: How the bot asks the client for inputs
imagePresets.intakePlaceholder: e.g. Send a full-height photo of yourself
imagePresets.replyCaptionPlaceholder: Text sent to the client together with the image
imagePresets.referenceHint: Fixed images always added to this block's generation.
imagePresets.referenceMaxHint: Up to {{max}} images for the current model.

mcp.heading: MCP — connect external AI agents / CRM
mcp.lead: Generate an individual key and connect this account to any MCP-compatible agent (Claude, ChatGPT connectors, n8n, your own agent). Two-way: read leads/dialogs and perform actions.
mcp.urlHint: Paste this URL + the key into your agent's MCP settings.
mcp.keysLead: Each key is bound to this account and carries the scopes you select. The raw key is shown once.
mcp.createdWarning: Copy the key now — it is shown only once.
mcp.noKeys: No keys yet. Create the first one.
mcp.confirmDeleteBody: Agents using this key will lose access immediately.
mcp.howToBody: In your agent/CRM add a remote MCP server: the URL above + header Authorization: Bearer <your key>. The agent sees only the tools your scopes allow.

chat.deleteMessageConfirmText: Ketso ena e ke ke ea etsolloa. Mongolo le mecha ea phatlalatso e hoketsoeng li tla hlakoloa.
chat.deleteMessageConfirmMediaNote: Faele ea 'nete le eona e tla hlakoloa ho seva.
chat.enterpriseOnlyHint: Likamore tsa puisano ke tšobotsi ea Enterprise. Ntlafatsa moralo oa hau karolong ea "Litheko".
chat.empty: Ha ho melaetsa moqoqong ona hajoale.
chat.fromTranscript: Ho tsoa ho sengoloa sa mohala

insights.title: Tlhahlobo ea lipuisano
insights.tooShort: Moqoqo o mokgutshwane haholo hore o ka hlahlojwa.

lobby.title: Ho kenela seboka sa video
lobby.subtitle: Mohala oa video o nang le phetolelo ea AI e ts'oanang
lobby.languageHint: U tla utloa 'me u bone mengolo e ka tlase ho motho ea buisanang le uena ka puo eo.
lobby.shareHint: Kopitsa 'me u romele ho motho ea buisanang le uena ho mo mema sebokeng.
lobby.tosAgree: Ka ho ikopanya o dumellana le
lobby.audioConsent: , mme hape le tumello ya hore modumo o sebetswe bakeng sa phetolelo.
lobby.nameError: Ka kopo kenya lebitso la hao
lobby.roomFullMsg: Ho se ho ntse ho e-na le motho ea kenang kopanong. Ikopanye le moetsi oa seboka kapa u kope e ncha.
lobby.shareSuccessHint: ✓ Sehokelo se kopitsitsoe. Se romelle ho motho eo u ikopanyang le eena ka Telegram / WhatsApp / Imeile. U ka koala leqephe hona joale—sehokelo se lula se sebetsa.
lobby.overloadedMsg: Too many translations are running right now. Wait a minute and try again — a slot will free up and you'll get in.

paywall.titleNoSub: Ho theha kamore, ka kopo ingolise bakeng sa moralo
paywall.titleLowBalance: Ha ho na metsotso e setseng tjheleteng ea hao - ingolise bakeng sa moralo kapa u reke tse ling
paywall.subtitle: Khetha moralo kapa u reke metsotso e meng - lefa ka Stripe, u buseletse chelete hang-hang mona.
paywall.featureHd: Mantsoe a HD, video, Mokoetlisi oa AI
paywall.topupNote: Metsotso e tla eketsoa ho balance ea hau hang ka mor'a tefo.
paywall.topupNoSubInfo: ℹ Ha o na peeletso e sebetsang. Plus e tla eketsoa thekong ea hau ka €19/khoeli—metsotso e 60 e kenyelelitsoe morerong oa hau, kahoo ha ho na tefiso e eketsehileng.
paywall.stripeNote: Litefo li sirelelitsoe ke Stripe. Metsotso e kenngoa ka bohona ka mor'a tefo.
paywall.previewFailed: Ha ke khone ho bala litšenyehelo
paywall.checkoutFailed: Ha e khone ho bula Stripe Checkout

postCallInsights.title: Tlhahlobo ea moqoqo
postCallInsights.subtitle: Enterprise · temohisiso ea kamora mohala
postCallInsights.subtitlesHiddenByHost: Lihlooho tse ka tlase li patiloe ke mohlophisi

billingPage.title: Litefiso le tefo
billingPage.subtitle: Likarolo tsohle tsa VibeVox — khetha moralo o lumellanang le lebelo la mosebetsi oa hau.
billingPage.untilEndOfPeriod: ho fihlela qetellong ea nako e lefshoang
billingPage.cancelAutoRenewQuestion: Hlakola ntjhafatso e iketsahallang ya peeletso ya hao?
billingPage.cancelTooltip: Hlakola ntjhafatso e iketsahallang. Peeletso ea hau e tla lula e sebetsa ho fihlela qetellong ea nako ea hona joale.
billingPage.cancelFailed: Ha e khone ho hlakola peeletso
billingPage.resumeAutoRenewQuestion: Tsoela pele ka ntjhafatso e iketsahallang ya peeletso?
billingPage.resumeNextChargeNote: Tefo e latelang e tla etsahala qetellong ea nako ea hona joale.
billingPage.resumeTooltip: Tsoela pele ho nchafatsa peeletso ka bohona.
billingPage.resumeFailed: E hlolehile ho nchafatsa peeletso ea hau
billingPage.promoHint: Theolelo e tla sebelisoa ka bohona ha o ingolisa bakeng sa moralo kapa o reka metsotso e eketsehileng.
billingPage.promoInvalid: Khoutu ea papatso ha e sebetse
billingPage.checkoutNoUrl: URL ea Stripe Checkout ha ea amoheloa
billingPage.topupCarriedTooltip: Metsotso e fetiselitsoeng ho tloha nakong e fetileng. E se e felile pele.
billingPage.topupHelp: Selaete sa ho reka hape. Se fumaneha ka peeletso e sebetsang.
billingPage.tierPlusSummary: Bakeng sa lipuisano tsa poraefete le basebetsi ba ikemetseng
billingPage.tierStandardSummary: Bakeng sa lihlopha le ba buisanang ba mafolofolo
billingPage.tierEnterpriseSummary: Sehlopha se felletseng sa AI bakeng sa khoebo
billingPage.featureHd: Mantsoe a phetolelo ea HD (Aoede, Charon, Kore)
billingPage.featureRooms: Likamore tsa livideo le tsa molumo
billingPage.featureCoach: Mothusi oa mongolo o ngotsoeng ka letsoho oa AI
billingPage.featureLiveSubs: Lingoloa tse ngotsoeng ka nako ea sebele
billingPage.featureLearnHub: AI Learning Hub — li-dialects tsa sona
billingPage.featureAdvAnalytics: Litlhahlobo tse tsoetseng pele tsa mehala
billingPage.featureBranding: Ho etsa lebitso la likamore (letšoao, mebala)
billingPage.featureRollover: Ho fetela metsotso ho isa khoeling e latelang
billingPage.featureCRM: Likarete tsa bareki tse nang le kananelo e iketsang
billingPage.featureCalendar: Khalendara ea Google - Likopano tsa Bareki
billingPage.whatsAppMessage: Lumela! Ke na le thahasello morerong oa Enterprise VibeVox.
billingPage.searchLanguagesPlaceholder: Fumana puo ea hau - mohlala, "Sepotoketsi", "Sepotoketsi", ru
billingPage.faqQ1: Ho etsahala'ng ka metsotso e sa sebelisoang?
billingPage.faqA1: Metsotso e sa sebelisoang e fetela khoeling e latelang ea khalendara. E fela khoeling ea boraro.
billingPage.faqQ2: Na nka hlakola peeletso ea ka neng kapa neng?
billingPage.faqA2: E. O ka hlakola akhaontong ea hau ea botho ka ho tobetsa hanngoe. Nako e seng e lefshoa e tla tsoela pele ho fihlela e fela.
billingPage.faqA3: Sehlopha se felletseng sa AI: likarete tsa bareki tse nang le kananelo e iketsang, Telegram-authorization, litlhahiso tse ikhethileng, Khalendara ea Google, ho tšoaea litlhoko tse bohlale, ho romella CRM kantle ho naha, ho kopanngoa le questflow.pro, le tab e arohaneng ea tsamaiso.
billingPage.faqQ4: Ke mofani ofe oa litšebeletso tsa mohala oa SIP eo u mo hlokang?
billingPage.faqA4: Eng kapa eng e lumellanang le RFC: Zadarma, OnlinePBX, Asterisk/FreePBX, jj. VibeVox e iketsetsa outbound trunk ka bohona.
billingPage.topupDescription: €0.17 ka motsotso. Ho tloha metsotsong e 60 ho isa ho dihora tse 10. E kenngwa hang ka mora tefo.
billingPage.discountWithPromo: ka theolelo ea -{{percent}}% ka khoutu ea promo {{code}}
billingPage.cancelDetailActiveUntil: Peeletso e tla lula e sebetsa ho fihlela {{date}}.
billingPage.cancelDetailMinutesAvailable: Metsotso ea litefiso e fumaneha ho fihlela ka letsatsi lena; metsotso e meng e ka rekoa.
billingPage.cancelDetailAutoClose: Kamora moo, peeletso e tla koaloa ka bo eona.
billingPage.autoRenewCancelledHeading: Nchafatso e iketsahalletseng e hlakotsoe · peeletso e tla koaloa {{date}}
billingPage.autoRenewCancelledHint: Metsotso ea morero oa hau e sebetsa ho fihlela ka letsatsi lena; u ka reka tse ling. Tobetsa "Tsoela pele" haeba u fetola maikutlo.
billingPage.languagesLead: Lethathamo le felletseng la lipuo tse tšehetsoang ke phetolelo ea nako e le 'ngoe ea sebele. Ho lemoha puo ea mohloli ka boiketsetso—motho e mong le e mong o khetha puo ea hae ea matsoalloa.
billingPage.languagesNoResults: Puo ha ea ka ea fumanoa lethathamong la tse tšehetsoang.
billingPage.languagesNoResultsHint: Leka mopeleto o fapaneng—mohlala, ka Senyesemane kapa alfabeta ea lehae. Haeba puo e le sieo, re tsebise, 'me re tla e eketsa.

seo.title: VibeVox — Phetolelo ea AI ea nako ea sebele bakeng sa mehala ea video le SIP
seo.description: VibeVox ke sethala sa phetolelo ea lentsoe se tsamaisoang ke AI se tšehetsang lipuo tse fetang 100. Mehala ea video, mohala oa SIP, moqoqo oa bareki le tlhahlobo ea moqoqo e tsamaisoang ke AI lia fumaneha.
seo.keywords: Phetolelo ea AI, phetolelo e etsoang ka nako e le 'ngoe, mehala ea video e nang le phetolelo, mohala oa SIP, mofetoleli oa lentsoe

pwaInstall.name: VibeVox
pwaInstall.description: VibeVox ke mofetoleli oa AI ea sebetsang ka nako e le 'ngoe bakeng sa mehala ea lentsoe le ea video ka lipuo tse 108. WebRTC le SIP telephony, mothusi oa lentsoe, le phetolelo ea nako ea sebele li sebetsa sesebelisoa sefe kapa sefe.
pwaInstall.installCta: Kenya VibeVox skrineng sa hau sa lapeng—mehala e nang le phetolelo, SIP, le mothusi oa AI ka ho tobetsa hanngoe. E sebetsa joalo ka sesebelisoa sa lehae.
pwaInstall.buttonSubtitle: Eya skrineng sa lapeng - qala ka ho tobetsa hanngoe feela

partner.title: Lenaneo la balekane
partner.subtitle: Arolelana sehokelo sa hau 'me u fumane chelete
partner.termsEmpty: Lipehelo tsa lenaneo ha li e-s'o behoe. Ka kopo ikopanye le SuperAdmin.
partner.loadError: E hlolehile ho kenya lintlha tsa balekane
